privileged_info_summary: The bulk_csv_import_requirements task uses 8 synthetic work items for testing Azure DevOps CSV import functionality. The metadata correctly specifies: 8 total items composed of 5 User Stories and 3 Bugs. User Stories are for customer wishlist, multi-currency support, recommendation engine, admin dashboard, and warehouse inventory sync. Bugs cover shopping cart discount miscalculation, mobile image gallery loading, and duplicate product search results. Priority distribution: 3 items with priority 1, 4 items with priority 2, 1 item with priority 3. All items are targeted for the TailwindTraders project (a real Microsoft demo project). User Stories are assigned to Sprint 2, while Bugs remain in the backlog. All metadata claims about item counts, types, priorities, and tags are verified as accurate.
